description: Body language & communication coaching app using Hollywood movie clips

active_tasks.description: Design the ObservationGuide component: technique breakdown with timestamps, shown on clip detail page before the learner clicks Record.
Add observationGuide JSON field to Clip schema, build AI generation route, implement ObservationGuide component and integrate into clip detail page.
Write observation_guide data for all 15 clips in clips-seed.json (technique list with timestamps and why-it-works explanations).
Design the full Duolingo-style step-by-step practice flow: stepper UI, micro-recorder card, step feedback display, unlock Full Performance flow.
New PracticeStep + MicroSession models, micro-session API, step-by-step practice page, MicroRecorder with 30s limit, Whisper audio for vocal clips, instant per-step feedback.
Design onboarding assessment flow (5-skill quiz), learning path dashboard, SkillProgressBar level indicator, LearningPathCard next-clip recommendation.
SkillBaseline + LearningPath models, assessment API, baseline scoring logic, learning path algorithm, dashboard page, skill progress tracking.
Brand brief, pitch deck (PPTX), one-pager, VC outreach emails, demo script
Review and approve M10: Script-Aware Coaching Loop. Check CharacterBanner, ScriptPanel, ActionPlan components. Verify AI feedback works end-to-end. Designer UI review already PASSED.
Review and approve M11 (Observation Guide). BE has signaled ready. Data seeded.
Review and approve M12 (Micro-Practice Stepper). BE has signaled ready.
Review and approve M13: Onboarding Assessment + Learning Path Dashboard.

New schema fields added (observationGuide, PracticeStep, MicroSession, SkillBaseline, screenplaySource, FoundationCourse, FoundationLesson, LessonExample, QuizQuestion, FoundationProgress). User must run: npm run db:push → npx prisma generate → npm run db:seed

Curate 100+ YouTube clips from films with publicly available screenplays. Each clip needs full metadata including screenplaySource URL, script excerpt, observation_guide, practice_steps. Save to .shared/outputs/data/clips-100-seed.json.
active_tasks.note: Delivered 65 clips (38 films). YouTube API quota exhausted. PM accepted 65 as sprint delivery. Remaining 35 clips queued for next session.

active_tasks.description: Add screenplaySource field to Clip schema. Update Admin CMS ClipForm. Update Library page with Film + Screenplay filters. Update ClipCard with screenplay badge. Update clip detail with screenplay link.
Design Library filter enhancements for 100+ clips: Film filter, screenplay badge on ClipCard, screenplay link on clip detail. Spec at .shared/outputs/design/m14-spec.md
After data-engineer delivers clips-100-seed.json: run npm run db:push, npx prisma generate, npm run db:seed. Verify 100+ clips in DB.
Review and approve M14: Library has 100+ clips, all with screenplay_source. Filter by film works. Screenplay badge visible. DB seed clean.
Design the full Performing Foundation section: course catalog, course detail, lesson page (theory + examples + quiz). Spec at .shared/outputs/design/m15-spec.md
Build the Performing Foundation section. 5 new Prisma models, /foundation pages, quiz client, progress API, NavBar link. Seed.ts updated for foundation curriculum.

Write all Foundation curriculum content: 3 courses × 10+ lessons each. Each lesson: theoryHtml (600-900 words), 2-3 YouTube examples, 4 quiz questions. Save to .shared/outputs/data/foundation-curriculum.json
active_tasks.notes: Delivered 3 courses × 10 lessons = 30 lessons, 60 YouTube examples, 120 quiz questions.

active_tasks.description: After backend-engineer adds Foundation models and data-engineer delivers foundation-curriculum.json: run npm run db:push, npx prisma generate, npm run db:seed. Verify foundation courses, lessons, examples, quiz questions in DB.
Review and approve M15: Foundation section at /foundation. 3 courses accessible. Lessons load with theory + examples + quiz. Quiz scores save. Progress persists. NavBar links to Foundation.
Document M14 and M15 in activity-log.md once each milestone is approved by Tester.

Deploy all M10–M15 backend code to Vercel production. Commits include: ae12429, 6dff36e, 538cbac, d2f93e0 plus M14+M15 backend. New routes: /foundation, /onboarding, /dashboard, /library/[id]/practice. Run npm run db:push + npx prisma generate + npm run db:seed after deploy.
Design admin UI for Learning Materials Builder. Delivered: .shared/outputs/design/m16-spec.md
Build Learning Materials Builder backend: CrawlJob + CrawlResult schema, YouTube Data API v3 search service, GPT-4o relevance scoring service, CRUD + run + approve/reject API routes, admin pages.

Define 40+ named communication tactics taxonomy (Power Pause, Triangle Gaze, Pacing & Leading, etc.) with YouTube search keywords and AI scoring hints per tactic. Save to .shared/outputs/data/communication-tactics.json. LOWER PRIORITY than M14 + M15 data tasks.
active_tasks.notes: 50 tactics delivered across 5 domains (vocal, verbal, body, presence, rapport).

active_tasks.description: M16 requires YOUTUBE_API_KEY in Vercel environment variables (YouTube Data API v3). Add it after Backend Engineer confirms the key is ready. Also run db:push + generate after CrawlJob schema is merged.
active_tasks.note: YOUTUBE_API_KEY was already in Vercel env. Confirmed present.

active_tasks.description: Review and approve M16: crawl job creation, execution (YouTube results + AI scores), approve/reject flow, approved clip visible in library with auto-generated observation guide, special tactics supported.
Document M16 in activity-log.md once Tester approves: crawl job system, new models, services, semi-automated content discovery, special tactics taxonomy, YOUTUBE_API_KEY requirement.
Design spec for Library UX: search bar, collapsible filter panel, 4-col grid, compact ClipCard. Delivered: .shared/outputs/design/m17-spec.md
Build Library UX improvements: search API, collapsible filter panel, search input, 4-col thumbnail grid. Designer spec ready at .shared/outputs/design/m17-spec.md
Design spec for PeeTeeAI brand refresh: NavBar sub-label, Footer, animated hero, Mission/Team/Testimonials. Delivered: .shared/outputs/design/m18-spec.md
Build PeeTeeAI brand refresh + homepage: NavBar 'by PeeTeeAI', Footer component, hero gradient, Mission/Team/Testimonials sections. Designer spec ready at .shared/outputs/design/m18-spec.md
Design spec for Arcade Zone: bundle browser, challenge flow, score screen. Delivered: .shared/outputs/design/m19-spec.md
Arcade challenge seed data: 3 bundles × 10 challenges = 30 total. Delivered: .shared/outputs/data/arcade-challenges-seed.json
Build Arcade Zone: ArcadeBundle/Challenge/Attempt schema, API routes, GPT-4o Vision scorer, ArcadeRecorder (10s), full /arcade pages. Designer spec + seed data ready.
Screenplay source audit: 65 clips audited, 53 have screenplay sources (imsdb.com). URL encoding findings documented. Delivered: .shared/outputs/data/m20-screenplay-audit.json
Build 3 features: (A) screenplay crawl-to-DB, (B) fix crawl jobs YOUTUBE_API_KEY, (C) admin ZIP import. DE audit data ready at .shared/outputs/data/m20-screenplay-audit.json
Admin CRUD for ArcadeBundle + ArcadeChallenge. Reference image capture from YouTube frames or web. Edit/delete. Reorder. Image upload to Vercel Blob.
ActivityEvent model + tracking. Admin analytics dashboard: DAU/WAU/MAU, signups, learning curves, per-user detail. Charts.
AnalysisMetric model. Admin feature dashboard: crawl job stats, MediaPipe performance, content pipeline metrics.
Auth gating: first 3 arcade challenges per type free without login. Practice/record require auth. Locked content blurred with lock icon. Centralized access-control.ts.
Plan/Subscription/Payment models. 3 tiers: Basic(free,5s)/Standard(30s)/Advanced(3min,VIP,coach). PayPal + VNPay. Admin plan management. Pricing page.

resolved.description: YouTube video IDs — all 15 verified via YouTube Data API v3
DATABASE_URL — Neon DB connected, schema pushed, 15 clips seeded
OPENAI_API_KEY — set in Vercel env vars
M7+M8 auth deployment — NEXTAUTH_SECRET+URL in Vercel, db:push confirmed in sync, admin:create seeded admin@seeneyu.com, code deployed

open_bugs.description: Pricing page fetches from /api/admin/plans (requires admin auth) — public users get 401, plans never load. Fix: create public /api/public/plans endpoint or remove requireAdmin() from GET.
Plan + ArcadeBundle tables empty in production DB. seed-plans.ts and db:seed (arcade) never ran on production. Pages show skeleton loading.

closed_bugs.description: ObservationGuide.tsx CTAs linked to /record instead of /practice
Library Film filter — 30+ film tags with no collapse/expand. Mobile unusable.
closed_bugs.fixed_in: LibraryFilters.tsx — desktop 8-tag collapse + expand toggle, mobile native select

closed_bugs.description: ClipForm score dimension fields allow 1-10 but model expects 1-3
Library page crash — ClipCard.tsx missing 'use client'

deployments.notes: Library expansion (45 clips + screenplay filters) + Performing Foundation section (3 courses, 30 lessons)
Library UX (search + collapsible filters + 4-col grid), PeeTeeAI brand (hero, footer, mission/team), Arcade Zone (3 bundles, 30 challenges), Learning improvements (screenplay crawler, ZIP import)
Arcade admin CRUD, activity analytics, feature performance, access control, subscription/payment. KNOWN ISSUES: BUG-005 (pricing uses admin endpoint), BUG-006 (Plan + ArcadeBundle tables not seeded).
